title: tragacantha sesamea
intro: Tragacantha sesamea, also known as the Lesser Burnet, is a flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been utilized to treat wounds, reduce swelling, and alleviate pain. The plant's health benefits include its ability to improve respiratory issues and help manage fever, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Tragacantha sesamea can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
